title: All I Want for Christmas Is You

earnings.assumptions: Estimate is heavily seasonal and models annual holiday streaming, sync usage, radio recurrence, and strong songwriter participation.

ownership.master_owner: Major-label master with very high-value artist-side participation
ownership.publishing_owner: Publishing appears exceptionally valuable because of writer-side participation
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No song-specific catalog sale adjustment is modeled
ownership.notes: This is one of the strongest annual seasonal songs in the catalog; year-to-year earnings can fluctuate materially.
